De.Fi Crypto Antivirus Testimonials

John Izaguirre

Former Binance Chain Director

“Having followed closely the De.Fi Team for years, I can attest to their transformative impact on the cryptocurrency landscape. Their game-changing Web3 SuperApp & Crypto Antivirus set a new standard for enhancing Crypto Security. I will be looking forward to the unfolding of their future innovations in the dynamic world of DeFi!”

Hamzah Khan

Head of DeFi at Polygon Labs

“We are thrilled De.Fi is bringing their powerful suite of security tools to the Polygon ecosystem. The De.Fi Antivirus will provide users with an added layer of protection against harmful crypto exploits, ultimately elevating the standard for Web3 security”

Marco Cora

Senior Vice President of Business and Operations at Matter Labs

We’re excited to see security-specific deployments such as De.Fi making their way to zkSync Era. Permissionless protocols enable freedom by allowing anyone to participate in the Ethereum ecosystem, but they also come with a critical responsibility for its users and builders to practice due diligence which is paramount for avoiding scams on permissionless networks like Ethereum and zkSync Era

Michael Kong

Fantom Co-Founder

“As blockchain technology gains adoption and proliferates, so do threats to its security, Fantom is pleased to welcome De.Fi’s Web3 Defense Suite to its ecosystem, which will further complement Fantom’s best-in-class smart contract security offerings."

Adam Liposky

Moonbeam Foundation Ecosystem Lead

"As we pave the way for a more interconnected future, ensuring access to tools that enable security for Web3 users becomes a top priority. This integration with De.Fi's cutting-edge Crypto Antivirus with Moonbeam provides ecosystem participants with a powerful layer of protection against smart contract vulnerabilities”

Marek

Celo Co-Founder

"The De.Fi Crypto Antivirus is a valuable addition to the Celo ecosystem, enabling safe, continued exploration of Web3 applications in DeFi, ReFi, NFT sectors, and beyond"

Yida Gao

Shima Capital Co-Founder

"De.Fi Safe is a crucial addition to the web3 ecosystem," said Yida Gao, Founder & Managing General Partner at Shima Capital, a lead investor in De.Fi. “As the first cross-chain decentralized security network, De.Fi is a much needed project for the overall safety of crypto users, and De.Fi Safe takes user safety to the next level by providing personalized risk audits directly from their wallets based on the smart contracts they interact with. That’s groundbreaking!”

Patrick Scott | Dynamo DeFi

@Dynamo_Patrick

Did you know that you can avoid memecoin scams, rugpulls, and honeypots in under 10 seconds?


This won’t work in every instance, especially those where the team sells and quits but it will help you to avoid falling prey to easily preventable rugpulls.


The @defi Scanner allows you to paste in any token or smart contract address and it will identify red flags, such as:
-Functions to mint unlimited tokens
-The ability to change wallet balances -Honeypots


Note that @defi has sponsored content on my channel before, but this video was not paid for. I'm sharing this tool, to help people stop losing money to avoidable scams.

2:16 AM · May 13, 2023

33
251
71
Share

Patrick Scott | Dynamo DeFi

@Dynamo_Patrick

Did you know that you can avoid memecoin scams, rugpulls, and honeypots in under 10 seconds?


This won’t work in every instance, especially those where the team sells and quits but it will help you to avoid falling prey to easily preventable rugpulls.


The @defi Scanner allows you to paste in any token or smart contract address and it will identify red flags, such as:
-Functions to mint unlimited tokens
-The ability to change wallet balances -Honeypots


Note that @defi has sponsored content on my channel before, but this video was not paid for. I'm sharing this tool, to help people stop losing money to avoidable scams.

Patrick Scott | Dynamo DeFi

@Dynamo_Patrick

Did you know that you can avoid memecoin scams, rugpulls, and honeypots in under 10 seconds?


This won’t work in every instance, especially those where the team sells and quits but it will help you to avoid falling prey to easily preventable rugpulls.


The @defi Scanner allows you to paste in any token or smart contract address and it will identify red flags, such as:
-Functions to mint unlimited tokens
-The ability to change wallet balances -Honeypots


Note that @defi has sponsored content on my channel before, but this video was not paid for. I'm sharing this tool, to help people stop losing money to avoidable scams.

2:16 AM · May 13, 2023

33
251
71
Share

BeInCrypto

@beincrypto

There have been so many #DeFi exploits this year that @defiyield_app has taken steps to develop what it calls a 'DeFi REKT database.'


More than 2,500 projects have been REKT in 5 years, with a total $1.7B lost according to the database.


Read more

12:35 PM · Aug 31, 2021

7
4

We aim to keep you safe

DeFi works best when you’re protected. Invest confidently with our advanced, easy-to-use security solutions.

Explore the protection toolkit →

Shield

Decline risky allowances with our pioneering security tool. It automatically checks smart contracts for known security issues.

Check your approvals →

Advanced scanning capabilities: 20+ critical threat detectors, swap and holder analyses

OR

FAQs

What is DeFi?

DeFi stands for “Decentralized Finance”. It represents a subset of the cryptocurrency industry focused on financial tools that operate automatically via smart contracts. Traditional financial tasks like trading, borrowing, and saving assets are all made possible by DeFi - all with no centralized middlemen.

What is De.Fi?

De.Fi (DeDotFi) was founded during the DeFi Summer of 2020 by a group of DeFi natives with just two goals in mind: make DeFi a safer and more convenient space for everyone. During three years of development, the De.Fi team has grown to 50+ team members worldwide. We work daily to build life-saving products for DeFi investors around the world.

The De.Fi team has created Crypto’s First Antivirus - the most advanced security system in the crypto space, as well a range of other products including our crypto wallet tracker, NFT portfolio tracker, REKT Database, Audit Databases, the largest multichain dashboard/APY aggregator, and more.

How comprehensive is your DeFi dashboard?

The De.Fi SuperApp is an ultimate gateway to web3: it includes the biggest DeFi tracker that supports 45+ blockchains, 8+ centralized exchanges, and 450+ protocols, as well as the largest DeFi yield farming APY aggregator, that tracks live and historical data of 10,000+ LPs and Vaults on 300+ DeFi protocols.

The DeFi dashboard by De.Fi is the most convenient way to track your multichain positions & balances: simply create a bundle of all your DeFi wallet crypto addresses and exchange accounts, and track your whole crypto portfolio in 1 place.

Why do you call yourself a DeFi “antivirus”?

De.Fi is the Inventor of Crypto’s First Antivirus - a multi-layer security solution built on machine learning that prevents users from interacting with high-risk assets. De.Fi’s Antivirus is the Ecosystem of our free smart contract audit Scanner and Shield tools:

Scanner performs a comprehensive technical and liquidity analysis of any crypto smart contract in just a few seconds. Scanner is an ultimate web3 antivirus tool that runs 100+ security detectors. Simply insert the smart contract address of any crypto asset, and in just a few seconds Scanner will show a detailed breakdown of all risks associated with it.

Shield automatically scans any De.Fi web3 wallet tracker user address for high-risk approvals: tokens, NFTs, staking vaults, and other smart contracts. Shield is capable of identifying any high-risk contracts that a user has approved with their wallet in just a few seconds. On top of that, Shield provides a comprehensive description of each risk, as well as the USD amount exposed to a particular risky approval. Once detected, you can use Shield to revoke risky positions from your wallet.

What crypto research tools do you offer?

Over three years of development, De.Fi has developed a whole range of innovative tools:

De.Fi Scanner and De.Fi Shield are innovative security tools that identify any high-risk asset before the user even interacts with them. Built on machine learning, Scanner and Shield have self-upgradeable architecture that frequently adds new static and dynamic security detectors.

De.Fi Dashboard is the only DeFi portfolio tracker that supports 45+ blockchains, 8+ centralized exchanges, and 450+ protocols - all in 1 place! You can create a bundle of your multichain wallets and exchange accounts (e.g. MetaMask + Phantom + Kepler + Binance Account), and track your whole crypto portfolio in 1 place. Get started with your portfolio today by connecting your DeFi wallet app!

De.Fi Explore is the largest APY aggregator that tracks 10,000+ liquidity pools and vaults on 300+ protocols on numerous blockchains. Set various filters and adjust the search to find the LP or Vault that matches your risk appetite! On top of that, De.Fi’s APY Aggregator tracks not just the live APR and TVL data of pools, but also the historical data.

De.Fi’s REKT and Audit Databases are the biggest databases of crypto hacks & scams, as well as smart contract audits on more than 5,000+ DeFi projects. Managed by the De.Fi Security

Department, both databases are getting updated daily to make sure to match the latest DeFi events.

Beyond our main site, we also offer industry insights across social media. Keep an eye on our Twitter for the latest news and subscribe to our YouTube to track the hottest upcoming crypto airdrops.

How accurate is your DeFi data?

The De.Fi team consists of 50+ highly motivated people, 35+ of which are developers that focus on ensuring that data presented on the platform is accurate - from individual token pricing to security detectors and on-chain analysis. We are committed to operating a reliable wallet tracker crypto enthusiasts can depend on.

Your safe place to invest in DeFi Manage your digital assets with a full suite of innovative tools. Invest safely, supported by our auditing experts.
